76331.subject: Odkaz na prieskum
76331.body: EmailSurvey_SK /* mobil */ @media only screen and (max-width: 600px){ .wrap { width:100% !important; } .full { display:block !important; width:100% !important; } .p10 { padding:10px !important; } } #outlook a{padding:0;} .ReadMsgBody{width:100%} .ExternalClass{width:100%} .ExternalClass, .ExternalClass p, .ExternalClass span, .ExternalClass td, .ExternalClass div{line-height:100%} img{display:block;border:0;outline:none;text-decoration:none;-ms-interpolation-mode:bicubic;} table{border-collapse:collapse;border-spacing:0;mso-table-lspace:0pt;mso-table-rspace:0pt;} 96 Líder v kvalite doručovnia balíkov na Slovensku Vám ďakuje za prejavenú dôveru. Vážený zákazník, ďakujeme za využitie služieb GLS. Veríme, že doručenie Vášho balíka bolo pre Vás príjemným zážitkom. Keďže spoločnosť GLS dbá na kvalitu služieb, ocenili by sme hodnotenie našej práce zodpovedaním niekoľkých krátkych otázok. Dotazník je anonymný a zozbierané údaje budú použité výhradne na ďalšie zlepšovanie našich služieb. Ak ste boli s nami spokojný, ohodnoťte nás prosím 4 alebo 5 hviezdičkami. Ďakujeme za Váš čas. GLS Slovakia Odkaz na prieskum www.gls-group.eu GDPR  |  VOP

76330.subject: Has China obtained the world’s most important machine?
76330.body:
The Economist’s week ahead

Автор: The Economist


Автор: The Economist

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/has-china-obtained-worlds-most-important-machine-the-economist-wzcue?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BU08pau2aS0Sm8zCqD0j%2BEw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2i_NGtU46FUck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrvzrpcy~az-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrvzrpcy-az
  
Sign up for free here to receive this newsletter in your inbox every Saturday. You’ll also get our weekly newsletter with an exclusive introduction from our editor-in-chief. There is something steampunk about the extreme-ultraviolet lithography, or EUV, machine. To a layman’s eyes, this bus-sized box of pipes, wires and cylinders looks part Heath Robinson, part “Blake’s 7”. Even the wizardry inside seems to blend the industrial and information ages: it prints semiconductors by firing lasers at molten tin. Yet this is the only contraption that makes chips sophisticated enough to power the world’s leading artificial-intelligence models. And it is only produced by one company, ASML, which is Dutch. So I was intrigued to learn that Howard Lutnick, America’s commerce secretary, had expressed fears that, despite strict export controls, one of these machines had got to China. After I spoke to ASML, which denies that allegation, my curiosity grew. Why would Mr Lutnick (who has not yet shared evidence with ASML) make such a claim? And what to make of recent reports that China has built its own EUV machine? If you want to understand the dispute over this prized technology, read the full story. Jeremy Page, Chief China correspondent Editor’s picks  Has China obtained the world’s most important machine? Its Dutch manufacturer is fighting to rebut American claims The future of chipmaking looks more like Manhattan than Silicon Valley Constrained by physics and politics, chipmakers are building upwards China’s semiconductor industry is racing to catch the West’s But it is proving easier to design chips than to make them AI has returned chipmaking to the heart of computer technology And the technological challenges are bigger than the political ones, argues Shailesh Chitnis Can cutting-edge semiconductors supercharge Japan? Visions of a high-tech hub in Hokkaido hinge on a single government-backed firm Go beyond the headlines Get unlimited digital access to The Economist by subscribing today.
Продовжити читати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/has-china-obtained-worlds-most-important-machine-the-economist-wzcue?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BU08pau2aS0Sm8zCqD0j%2BEw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2i_NGtU46FUck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview

76328.subject: Potvrdenka k Vášmu nákupu - obchodník D27 GLS, Južná trieda 1601/72, 040 01 Košice
76328.body: #outlook a { padding:0; } body { margin:0;padding:0;-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%;-ms-text-size-adjust:100%; } table, td { border-collapse:collapse;mso-table-lspace:0pt;mso-table-rspace:0pt; } img { border:0;height:auto;line-height:100%; outline:none;text-decoration:none;-ms-interpolation-mode:bicubic; } p { display:block;margin:13px 0; } 96 .mj-outlook-group-fix { width:100% !important; } @media only screen and (min-width:480px) { .mj-column-per-100 { width:100% !important; max-width: 100%; } .mj-column-per-90 { width:90% !important; max-width: 90%; } .mj-column-per-50 { width:50% !important; max-width: 50%; } } .moz-text-html .mj-column-per-100 { width:100% !important; max-width: 100%; } .moz-text-html .mj-column-per-90 { width:90% !important; max-width: 90%; } .moz-text-html .mj-column-per-50 { width:50% !important; max-width: 50%; } @media only screen and (max-width:480px) { table.mj-full-width-mobile { width: 100% !important; } td.mj-full-width-mobile { width: auto !important; } } Vážený klient, ďakujeme za Váš nákup u obchodníka D27 GLS Južná trieda 1601/72 040 01 Košice, ktorý ste vykonali dňa 2026-07-22 13:16:18.109 vo výške 27.4 EUR a posielame Vám v prílohe Vašu potvrdenku k tomuto nákupu. Potvrdenku si môžete stiahnuť aj pomocou nasledujúceho tlačidla: Stiahnite si potvrdenku Vážime si, že využívate naše služby a tešíme sa na Vašu ďalšiu návštevu. S pozdravom, Global Payments © 2026 Global Payments Inc. www.globalpayments.sk   Vyhlásenie o ochrane osobných údajov

76327.subject: 🚀 Build more with new token-efficient, lower-cost models
76327.body:
Email not displaying correctly? View in  
browser<https://notifications.google.com/g/vib/AKMee0eDnmArrcNQIFPlpnhMZOTz-dlvmkYUDwwSZh0DzSar_gpEoqdU9-g9L6AXeOL5dQRzUp87n_i1bhHnIRIDaA6QkQbxFVkCtZrCUoLhoQv4SqWweEcmxbaFS9fddcV9Mws>

Google AI  
Studio<https://c.gle/AKMee0e9I6F9bC5_7GZ0lCqsdiWiP_BAC21hPHjL8Wj0dH9C0t_rG9A6xPojSHkEjJrrm_la_o0ycK37EW1i4LlFIEpGNUdNR-opig2_VyBcoGpADwIAgSTm7sQqhy2Ues5JU8r5hjq0ZuoL6FgEnavTpy3hxw8>

Build more with new token-efficient, lower-cost models

Introducing Gemini 3.6 Flash and 3.5 Flash-Lite in the Gemini API

Read the  
docs<https://c.gle/AKMee0fcKQnomM5jwiG290d3TZ-KmFN5oa4SIxEIiW2z_8vLwi7yM6kgMReY0S03SIKbp6WWLK_vIxDje584ltxWR-WchBaxbsD5Z1MifTQNsxjeg8Du3d9ZsLpFXnf69WORNyq6f0Gpt5qgbgPd5p06PDM1Iat9L_XEuupPKsurHRozKMjM>

Try in AI  
Studio<https://c.gle/AKMee0fBroyX5dhCi8UsX6afb7dtz8yAmvQtPQ56UjCa-8tTO_qFHG52BtfB_i7ZvxGZzScTejV4_WmRAglrtn8NjsNRIuvrvgwsMys6wtzrQ4tXvP8dvhw5Omwksr4e3EE7zvFI2PpkSZBoeEYsB3C8EkXRyiJ4DKR114np94be12mCGK42VlXpCoP_0nH0o2tL2WiMa355>

Hi Oleg,

We are excited to share that Gemini 3.6 Flash (gemini-3.6-flash) and Gemini  
3.5 Flash-Lite (gemini-3.5-flash-lite) are now generally available in the  
Gemini API and ready for your production environments.

Gemini 3.6 Flash

17% more token-efficient with better quality and lower cost than Gemini 3.5  
Flash. Optimized for multi-step orchestration, full-stack code generation,  
and general reasoning.

Reduced  
pricing<https://c.gle/AKMee0cHRdAcMoounSYYp1t-hl032h_BbVooNSINz8PMjtGsRIKSrzNJ3TSa0fUxrD4sT-S_sS9M9Mif58bBtJ-QG0nDCKhInG7ymzc9qgdpLIzhN5B-0n6j8xYy_mHvWvs-WrNC5M6uAfrKHclEKYkBbm6gBngDgVDXkMRWRpfpKyilWm5-KjfZcKkPLRQOgAA>: Lower  
output token costs ($7.50/1M vs. $9.00/1M for 3.5 Flash), maintaining input  
tokens at $1.50/1M.

Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite

Our fastest and most cost-efficient 3.5 model, designed to scale agentic  
workflows that demand super fast inference.

Get full 'What's New'  
breakdown<https://c.gle/AKMee0f7Z9OaUtlOK_3OeAYJhdCzkjQqhzS3pJ60e0BUoXzpWtuCW1bsrnytsWWr_ctxXy_60BckPMSe1az8Is6wYUGgFK8qxF2QGjgubUCci5ulH5bTWUw4OKsqyflGgl51zHOV68jGZK16Uau2lP5ZfkkEPl7cMjNR5Dkk_S_5ZnoTGH_VwhODgcPMtFI82g8>

Abstract dark interface graphic with glowing tiles featuring lock, search,  
settings, document, and cursor  
icons.<https://c.gle/AKMee0fig7daIxVwigJlLJEDCuEqhUM2Nyq6lcefLqFbq2DSIdfObQ3iAdsTPX2wAN7piV6JIcx8XWwxlrK0jHuv-0zPrxUxdXgMu4Q96a8umqy6sumfW1hcPQhz4FEaO2iEACJ9b6lcKCyG9DJ48Kck_ohQCKwx5Dra6yCwcIn2xDW2yrdI5QGd>

Compare models in the demo app

Built with Gemini managed agents and the latest Flash models in Google AI  
Studio.

Try in the demo  
app<https://c.gle/AKMee0du163uO7GU-PvF-XP6Ga73QSisKTITFpT4aEnjTgB_O0wwo_F8HIG6gFEVESGjWXG8Le5ClfgBEjT10jqiCZHdWjy2V0t3KEmOHaW-EFdinJXbITZPC4KJCG2bQI1LAgg_BnBt87ZvfvYFbAR52Hwx5ksimKe7Z8xxzADpEBJbN1iV>

Start building

You can use our SDKs for Python, JavaScript, and Go, or make a direct REST  
API call with cURL. Get your paid API  
key<https://c.g

76324.subject: RE: Wedding photo+video
76324.body:
Dear Oleg,

There is no obstacle to photography.
The castle is also open on Sunday.
The fee for photography is 45,000 HUF
You will find all the important information in the attachment.
I will send it in English and Slovak.

I have registered you, you can pay on site

Best regards,


From: Oleg Novosadov <novosadovoleg@gmail.com>
Sent: Wednesday, July 22, 2026 11:51 AM
To: Füzérradvány Helyszín <fuzerradvanyikastely@nof.hu>
Subject: Wedding photo+video

Good day,

I would like to reserve a wedding photo session on 26 July 2026, from 12:00 PM to 2:00 PM, for 5 people.

We would like the photo session to take place inside the castle as well as outside in the castle park.

Thank you, and I look forward to your confirmation.
